description: Nika error code catalog. Seed data — will be replaced by the generated output of the nika-error L0 crate.

NIKA-001.title: Workflow parse error
NIKA-001.summary: The .nika.yaml file could not be parsed.
NIKA-001.help: Check YAML indentation, quoting, and that the top-level `schema:` and `tasks:` keys are present.
NIKA-001.example:
schema: nika/workflow@0.12
tasks:
  - id: hello
    verb: infer
    with:
      prompt: "Hi"

NIKA-002.title: Schema version mismatch
NIKA-002.summary: The `schema:` field does not match a version Nika understands.
NIKA-002.help: Use `schema: nika/workflow@0.12` (current stable). Older versions can be migrated with `nika migrate`.

NIKA-003.title: Duplicate task id
NIKA-003.summary: Two tasks share the same `id`. Task ids must be unique within a workflow.
NIKA-003.help: Rename one of the conflicting tasks. Task ids follow the identifier pattern `[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*`.

NIKA-004.title: Unknown binding
NIKA-004.summary: A template expression references a variable that does not exist in the current scope.
NIKA-004.help: Check that the referenced task ran before this one (via `depends_on`) and that the field name matches its output schema.

NIKA-005.title: Template evaluation failed
NIKA-005.summary: A template expression could not be rendered (type mismatch, missing field, or bad filter).
NIKA-005.help: Verify the type of the referenced value. Use `| default(...)` to provide a fallback for optional fields.
